description_long: This is a stone memorial obelisk featuring a prominent cross at its apex, set atop a multi-tiered pedestal. The main body is rectangular and tapers slightly upward, with a decorative band of rounded stone elements just below the cross. The front face appears to have an inscription panel, though the text is faint and difficult to read. The stone surface is weathered, with subtle discoloration and signs of age, giving it a dignified, historical appearance. The base is broad and solid, with beveled edges and a slightly raised platform, suggesting stability and permanence.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a cross on top, decorative banding, and an inscribed front panel, set on a broad, solid base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross, decorative band, and faint inscription panel on the main face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the structure and the profile of the cross and pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with visible weathering and no inscription.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the depth and solid construction.
attribute_inscription: There is a faint, rectangular inscription panel on the front face, but the text is not legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: A decorative band of rounded stone elements encircles the pedestal just below the cross; otherwise, ornamentation is minimal.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad and rectangular with beveled edges and a slightly raised platform, featuring a band of rounded stone elements above the main pedestal.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by a simple, upright cross with clean lines and a matte stone finish, with no additional decoration.
